title: French FM says France ready to repatriate most vulnerable citizens from Mideast
author: FRANCE24
fullText:
To display this content from YouTube, you must enable advertisement tracking and audience measurement.

00:58 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 16:21
summary: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot said Tuesday France will be ready to repatriate its most vulnerable citizens from the Middle East. Barrot said the government is looking at various options which included chartered flights and state aircraft.
